transcript: Speaker A (Boss on phone): तुम्हारी खराब इंग्लिश की वजह से फॉरेन क्लाइंट ने हमारी डील कैंसिल कर दी। [Because of your bad English, the foreign client cancelled our deal.] Speaker B (Woman): sorry sir, but English doesn't come in right? Speaker A: This is serious. अगर तुम अपनी इंग्लिश ठीक नहीं करोगी ना, I am telling you, your job is at risk. [If you don't improve your English, I'm telling you, your job is at risk.] Speaker B: चलिए भैया। [Let's go, brother.] Speaker C (Bike driver): Mam, you look like you're in a hurry. I know a shorter way with no traffic. Speaker B: भैया आप रैपिडो चलाते हो और आपकी इंग्लिश मेरे से भी अच्छी कैसे है? [Brother, you ride for Rapido and how is your English even better than mine?] Speaker C: ऐसा नहीं होगा मैम, इंग्लिश सीखना तो बहुत इजी है। बस अपना मोबाइल चाहिए और ये ऐप। [It's not like that, ma'am. Learning English is very easy. You just need your mobile and this app.] Speaker B: कौन सा ऐप? और ये काम कैसे करता है? [Which app? And how does it work?] Speaker C: MySivi ऐप। इसमें एक AI टीचर है जो आपके पर्सनल ट्यूटर की तरह काम करता है। आप जहां भी गलतियां करोगे, आपको इंस्टेंटली करेक्ट करता है बिना जज करे। ये ऐप आपको कुछ ही हफ्तों में फ्लूएंट बना देगा। बस हां, आपको डेली 10-15 मिनट प्रैक्टिस करनी पड़ेगी। [MySivi app. It has an AI teacher that works like your personal tutor. Wherever you make mistakes, it instantly corrects you without judging. This app will make you fluent in just a few weeks. But yes, you have to practice 10-15 minutes daily.] Speaker B: इतना सब फीचर्स है, महंगा होगा? [With so many features, it must be expensive?] Speaker C: बिल्कुल नहीं मैम, इस ऐप का ट्रायल सिर्फ 1 रुपये का है। और अगर आप ऐप से खुश नहीं हो तो आप कभी भी ट्रायल कैंसिल कर सकते हो। [Not at all, ma'am. The trial for this app is only 1 rupee. And if you are not happy with the app, you can cancel the trial anytime.] Speaker B: 1 रुपये ही तो है, अभी डाउनलोड करती हूं। [It's just 1 rupee, I'll download it right now.] Speaker D (Voiceover): Install Now पे क्लिक करो और MySivi ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [Click on Install Now and download the MySivi app.]
on_screen_text: तुम्हारी खराब ENGLISH KI WAJAH DEAL CANCEL SORRY BUT ENGLISH DOESN'T COME IN RIGHT THIS IS SERIOUS ENGLISH YOUR JOB IS AT RISK CHALIYE BHAIYA MAM, YOU LOOK LIKE YOU'RE IN A HURRY A SHORTER WAY WITH NO TRAFFIC BHAIYA AAP RAPIDO CHALATE HO ENGLISH MERE SE BHI ACHHI KAISE NAHI HONGA MAM ENGLISH SEEKHNA TOH EASY HAI MOBILE APP KAUN SA APP KAAM KARTA MySivi APP AI TEACHER PERSONAL TUTOR GALTIYA INSTANTLY CORRECT JUDGE FLUENT DAILY 10-15 MINUTES PRACTICE MEHENGA BILKUL NAHI TRIAL 1 Rupee Only CANCEL 1 RUPEE DOWNLOAD MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: A woman gets scolded by her boss for losing a client due to poor English. Her ride-share driver speaks fluent English and recommends the MySivi app, explaining its AI tutor features and 1-rupee trial. The ad ends with a call to action to install the app.
